case_title: DAVID HAWKINS VS. SEAN THOMAS DUFF

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF DAVID HAWKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN THOMAS DUFF IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,800.00 FILED BY HAWKINS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT DUFF, SEAN THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. [REQUEST SUBMITTED ON SC-150 POSTPONEMENT FORM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWKINS, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-06-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAVID HAWKINS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT SEAN THOMAS DUFF IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L WONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-07-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-06-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWKINS, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUFF, SEAN THOMAS STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS EXPIRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
